abilities: Railgun powered and ready to fire.
Days like this never get old! (3 eliminations or more during ultimate)
chatter: We're in this together. All of us.
Clear heads, sharp eyes.
Everything's online, functionality looks good... one last diagnostics check couldn't hurt.
Follow my lead. I'll make sure this goes smoothly.
I don't get jittery before a fight the way I used to. And you know what? I kinda miss it.
I thought my time in the field was done... but I guess you can't predict everything.
If you can out-think your opponent, it's easy to out-fight them.
Let's be quick. Murphy must be getting hungry... *laugh* When isn't she?
Make sure you're ready. Who knows what we'll find out there.
No nonsense. We do this clean, copy?
Plan to win, or expect to lose.
Superior firepower's good, but superior brainpower's better.
The best-laid plans have backup plans.
You count on me, I count on you.
Got a lot of cybernetics on this team, and no one to repair them. *sigh* (with multiple heroes with cybernetics on team)
Now I know we've got some selfish individuals on this team, but we're not winning this thing alone. (with multiple Talon members on team)
Hustle up!
Let's get this done.
Look alive out there!
Don't go easy. Let's bring this home!
Solid work. Keep it going.
I'm not giving up. Neither are you.
Keep it together. We can turn this around!
Let's win this thing.
This ends now. No, seriously.
This is the final stand. Make it count.
Come on, Vivian... get yourself together!
Gonna need a new paint job after this.
Hitting the ground running.
I'm not a fan of setbacks...
If they won't quit, neither will I.
Might have to adjust my approach.
Recalculating.
Someone's asking for a faceful of railgun.
What am I missing?
All right, Akande. It's my turn. (eliminated by Doomfist )
Sun got in my eyes. *chuckle* (eliminated by Illari )
Wilhelm's still got it... heh! Ouch... (eliminated by Reinhardt )
Gotta catch them off guard... Let me run those stats back. (eliminated from behind)
Backup is still on the way.
Team's still re-deploying.
Waiting on reinforcements.
Feeling better.
Nothing a quick repair won't fix.
Efficient design at work!
I'm on fire!
Ha! I'm on my game, now!
A solid upgrade.
I think I can work with this.
Not bad at all.
Our odds just got better.
This is a leg up.
Whatever is needed.
*sigh* Thanks.
Thanks for the help.
That feels much better.
Mmm, Vitamin D. Just what I needed. (healed by Illari )
I'll make it worth your while.
Just what I was looking for.
That's the stuff.
Damn.
I owe you one.
Thanks. I'll return the favor.
Enemy's back up.
The enemy's being revived!
No need to thank me.
You're too kind.
A job well done.
Trying to make me blush?
call-outs: I have eyes on a sniper!
There's the enemy turret! Take it out!
Let's kick this up a notch.
Close ranks and hold the line! They don't stand a chance!
Just as predicted! Keep them off a little longer.
Keep it tight. These last moments are crucial.
Victory is in sight... but don't get cocky!
I've faced worse odds. It's not over yet.
Time's running out. Let's pick it up!
We didn't come this far to quit now.
eliminations: It really was the honor of a lifetime. (eliminating any Overwatch member)
Don't make me lower the bar. (eliminating Anran )
I've got my work cut out to make with you. (eliminating Anran )
No slacking off, recruit. (eliminating Anran or Wuyang )
You're better than this, Emre. (eliminating Emre )
What happened to those high standards, agent? (eliminating Freja )
You always were better at S&R . (eliminating Freja )
For the last time: no begging. (eliminating Jetpack Cat )
That's for chasing Murphy . (eliminating Jetpack Cat )
Maybe stick to magazine covers. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
You're wild, all right... but that's a weakness too. (eliminating Mauga )
You sure you're Amari's daughter? (eliminating Pharah )
Come back wearing shoes, please. (eliminating Sigma )
You're not in charge anymore. (eliminating Soldier: 76 )
A real leader keeps a cool head. (eliminating Vendetta )
And you thought I was rusty!
Didn't expect a dogfight. (eliminating airborne enemy)
Don't need to fly when I can do that. (eliminating airborne enemy)
"Danger Close" is my middle name! (on low HP eliminating any hero using ultimate)
Speed and precision? No wonder you lost. (headshot final blow whilst Power Sliding)
This is restricted airspace. (eliminating airborne enemy)
Stay down! (eliminating enemy recently Resurrected by Mercy )
I though this was your home court? (eliminating Mauga on Samoa )
Slow down. Think. (eliminating Reinhardt using Charge)
Slow down. Thank you. (eliminating Reinhardt using Charge)
You can't let anger get the better of you! (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
I almost feel bad for them.
Resistance crushed. Let's get on with it.
Gotta stay on your toes, soldier.
I still plan to get you home safe.
Think I'd ever let you down?
Didn't expect the slide punch, huh? (while Power Sliding)
Eh. It was on the way, anyway. (while Power Sliding)
I'm not one to gloat, but... that had to hurt.
Wow. You really, uh... iced them. *nervous chuckle* Get it? (to Mei )
Guess every Amari's a good shot. (to Pharah )
There's the agent I remember. (to Soldier: 76 )
interactions: Ana : I'm a little surprised we both went the vigilante route. Sojourn : What can I say? We've got good sense.

Sojourn : You're keeping up with the team better than I expected. Maybe I should push you harder. Anran : Sure. Whatever bar you set for me, I'll hit it. Sojourn : Careful, now. Is that overconfidence I hear? Anran : Nope. Just determination.

Sojourn : You know, my twin was always sticking her neck out for me. Anran : I get that. Nothing beats helping your loved ones. Sojourn : If she hadn't let me return the favor, I'd miss out on knowing that feeling. Just some food for thought. Anran : Huh... I'd never thought of it that way.

Sojourn : You're too good with that gun to waste it on a life of crime. Ashe : I'll go on the straight and narrow when hell freezes over. Sojourn : Or, when the law catches up with you. Ashe : *chuckles* Same thing.

Sojourn : It feels like Talon has gone from covert ops to world domination overnight. Baptiste : They've done plenty of raids in the past, but nothing nearly this... loud. Sojourn : Huh. You have experience fighting Talon? Baptiste : Yeah. You could say that.
Sojourn : So, Bastion, how are you... settling in? Anything you... need? Bastion : *straightforward beeps* Sojourn : Yeah, uh... Sounds good!

Sojourn : Brigitte, you're one of my best agents. So I'll give you one chance to explain why you put a cat in a jetpack. Brigitte : I know it seems crazy, but she can help! Can't you, Fika? Aww, good girl! Jetpack Cat : *happy meows* Sojourn : *sigh* I should've stayed retired...
Sojourn : Interesting choices, Cole. A professional gamer , a Russian powerlifter , two mercenaries ... Cassidy : You like 'em. Sojourn : *chuckle* I really do.

Cassidy : Been awful quiet around these parts since Null Sector turned tail. Sojourn : Yeah, but I'm not convinced the fighting's over. Cassidy : You hopin' the world might still need us, after all? Sojourn : I'm never hoping for a storm. Doesn't mean I can stop one from rolling in.

Sojourn : Did you read the mission brief? D.Va : Huh? Oh, was I supposed to read that? Sojourn : *sigh* What did I say about teamwork? D.Va : "Teamwork gets you out alive"... but homework makes me dead inside!
Sojourn : In the mood to follow my orders today, Song? D.Va : If those orders involve me wrecking the bad guys, you bet! Sojourn : *chuckles* I'll see what I can do.
Doomfist : I hope this iteration of Overwatch proves more durable than the last. Sojourn : If I were you, I'd be more worried about what's going to happen to Talon .
Sojourn : Bet it's fun, hanging out in the sky. Echo : I do enjoy the perspective and tactical advantages, yes. Sojourn : Do you... ever pretend you're a bird? Echo : Constantly!
Sojourn : How are you still so optimistic, Echo? Echo : It's not always easy, but Dr. Liao created me to improve the world. Sojourn : She'd be proud of you.

Sojourn : Whatever Talon has on you... we can help. You just have to tell me what's going on. Emre : How many years did we work together, Viv? You should know if I'm not telling you something, I've got a good reason.

Sojourn : So, you finally made it. How's retirement going? Emre : *chuckle* Not bad. A few more firefights than I planned for. Sojourn : You seem prepared to me. Emre : Well, next time, I'm packing less heat, and more sunscreen.
Sojourn : You were a great asset to Overwatch . All those accolades... what happened? Freja : Same thing that happened to you. Times changed.
Sojourn : What kind of armor polish do you use, anyway? Genji : I make my own. Sojourn : With... *sniffs* Walnuts? Genji : Among other things.
Genji : My cybernetic form came at great cost. But... you asked to change? Sojourn : I learned too young that my body couldn't always keep up with me. Besides... it's hard to turn down rocket legs.
Sojourn : You can't act like a lone wolf on my team. Hanzo : Depending on others brings nothing but disappointment. Sojourn : Let's see if this mission proves you wrong.
Hanzo : Is... Murphy a lot to handle? Sojourn : Nah. Healthy snacks and belly rubs keep her content. Why, considering adoption? Hanzo : Maybe one day. When I settle down.

Hazard : You know, I really used to idolize you! Sojourn : I've heard that before. What made you lose faith in me, the Petras hearings? Hazard : Naw. It's the way you crawled back to Overwatch that left me scunnered. Sojourn : Well... that's a new answer.
Sojourn : Nice augments! They must have cost quite a bit. Illari : *bitter laugh* You have no idea...

Sojourn : You'd better stay out of trouble out there. Understand, recruit? Jetpack Cat : *innocent meows* Sojourn : And I'll know if you've been sneaking treats between missions! Jetpack Cat : *disappointed meows*
Junker Queen : Are you, on average, more mechanical or more human? Sojourn : Why? Junker Queen : Tryna figure out whether to scrap you for parts. Sojourn : Hm. Consider the railgun before you decide.

Junkrat : United again! The Overwatch strike team prepares for action! Sojourn : Hey. Keep the comms clear, please. Junkrat : This is the discipline the commander is known for. Sojourn : I'm about to be known for kicking your butt.
Junkrat : We're more metal than meat, you and I! Why... We could be twins! Sojourn : *sigh* And I was having such a nice day...
Sojourn : I saw you on the court with Fareeha last night. Your first time playing basketball? Juno : Oh, yes! You could tell? Sojourn : You were kicking the ball. Juno : And I scored in both hoops!
Sojourn : The Hashimoto are a massive force... with a lot more firepower than a gang of kids. Kiriko : What, you think we shouldn't fight back? Sojourn : I think you need to start fighting smarter.
Sojourn : So, you invented a form of light that's somehow alive. What's next for you? Lifeweaver : Saving the Earth, and maybe... learning to blow glass. Sojourn : Ha... those are on my list, too.

Lifeweaver : I need durable volunteers for some kinetic biolight experiments. Can I... count on you? Sojourn : I'm not your best subject. And this body isn't exactly cutting-edge tech anymore. Lifeweaver : Miss Chase, I insist that you never take yourself down in my presence again. Sojourn : *chuckle* All right, I get the picture.
Lúcio : Who's your favorite hockey team? Sojourn : I'm more of a basketball person. Lúcio : Not a fan of your home team, huh? Sojourn : Don't put words in my mouth.
Sojourn : You and Juno have been doing a great job to make the new recruits feel welcome. Lúcio : What can I say? It's all about curating the vibes.
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Sojourn : I don't see why it's relevant but... Leopard seal. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Mauga : Ha! Remember me, Captain? From the Blacksand Fires near Tahiti? Sojourn : Yeah. You still have our chainguns, I see. Mauga : Yep. Getting some good mileage out of 'em.

Sojourn : I saw you training yesterday. Can I give you a tip? Mei : Um... sure! Sojourn : Widen your stance. Might feel strange at first, but it keeps you balanced. Mei : Oh... thank you, Sojourn! I'll try that next time!
Mercy : Vivian! What have you been up to? Sojourn : Oh, you know... surviving. Mercy : And how's Murphy ? Sojourn : Doing much better, now that you aren't feeding her scraps all the time.
Mercy : So... how is that man you were telling me about? Sojourn : Angela, I'm not discussing my love life on a mission.

Orisa : You were Efi 's favorite character from the Overwatch cartoon . Sojourn : Ah... it made me look like a superhero. The reality was... not as inspiring. Orisa : You gave Efi courage when she needed it most. I am grateful for you, Captain. Sojourn : That... means a lot, Orisa.

Sojourn : How's it feel to be stationed at Gibraltar? Orisa : It is incredible! Efi has always dreamed of this. Sojourn : Yeah, well... Overwatch is all the better now that you two are part of it. Orisa : "Part of Overwatch"... how amazing.
Pharah: I think I'm going to get a chihuahua. Sojourn: You're joking. Pharah: Why, what's wrong with chihuahuas? Sojourn: Uh, well, for starters, they aren't corgis.

Ramattra: It is surprising that you would resist freedom for omnics. I'd heard you championed our cause. Sojourn: Maybe my optics need calibrating, because I don't see any "freedom" in indoctrination.

Sojourn : Null Sector has a foothold in so many cities... why withdraw your forces now? Ramattra : Would you have preferred I destroy humanity? Sojourn : The way you're consolidating your forces? I think you're still planning on it. Ramattra : I seek liberation, not devastation. I leave such senseless conflict to your kind.

Sojourn : *sigh* Why didn't you talk to me before you ran off with Talon ? Reaper : It would have turned into an argument. Sojourn : I thought we were friends, Gabe. Reaper : That's exactly why I left you out of it.

Sojourn : I'll be watching your back out there, Lieutenant. Reinhardt : You have nothing to worry about, Captain. (variant if Brigitte is on the team, replaces response above): Reinhardt : I'm sure Brigitte could give you some pointers!
Sojourn : Follow my lead, and we make it out of here in one piece. Roadhog : Watch the high ground. Sojourn : Huh, I didn't take you for a tactician. Roadhog : *grunt* Used to it.
Sojourn : I remember Overwatch tailing you back in the day. Before you teamed up with your... sidekick . Roadhog : Heh. Quieter times.
Sojourn : You know, I'm not so bad at cards myself. Even beat Burnes , one time. Soldier: 76 : Heh, I think she let you win. Sojourn : Hah! Burnes never let anybody win.
Sombra : Vivian Chase. Your Overwatch record was spotless. And your retirement was just as quiet, right? Sojourn : It was. And I plan to keep it that way.
Sojourn : I saw Vishkar is opening an office in Toronto . Symmetra : Yes... are you interested in applying? Sojourn : *chuckle* I'd rather clean cattle pens in Alberta.
Sojourn : Brigitte 's one of the best we've got. She's a natural leader. Torbjörn : Do you expect anything less from my daughter? Sojourn : From your daughter? I expected a lot more tantrums.
Sojourn : You're sitting out the next mission, Oxton. Emily made me promise you'd take it easy. Tracer : Maybe you could look the other way this time? Sojourn : And get on her bad side? Not a chance.
Sojourn : This war you're waging isn't just aimless chaos. What are you planning? Vendetta : Have patience, Commander. I would never spoil the finale.

Sojourn : What part of Canada are you from? Venture : Well, I was born in Nova Scotia. Then we moved to Nevada, then Buenos Aires, Reykjavík, Mexico City, Singapore, back to Nevada... sorry, what was the question again? Sojourn : Eh... don't worry about it.
Sojourn : You look familiar. Widowmaker : You don't. Sojourn : You were at my induction, standing with Gérard ... Amélie? Widowmaker : Call me by that name again, and you will share his fate.
Winston : Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Sojourn : Uh, Winston, please. No.

Wuyang : Man... you sure you guys invited the right person to Overwatch ? Sojourn : I'm sure. Winston was very insistent. Wuyang : I think I know my answer, but... I need sometime to let it sink in. Sojourn : I get it. It's not a decision to make lightly.
map-specific: Poor Reinhardt . What he must have seen here...
Emre always said he'd retire here. Wonder where he ended up.
Wow... I need to get one of these!
I really need to come here off the clock. Been dying to try the octopus.
I live here, so... don't blow up anything you don't have to.
The true North - strong and free.
Surprised everyone got here on time. The 401 was backed up like crazy. *scoff* As usual.
Null Sector may have withdrawn, but I can't shake the feeling there's trouble ahead.
Might be hypocritical of me, but I think there are some parts of science humans weren't meant to explore.
